name: Slow-Cooker Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the chicken.
2. Sprinkle the inside and outside of the chicken with salt, pepper, and onion salt.
3. Place the chicken in the slow cooker, breast side up.
4. Brush the chicken with melted butter and sprinkle with chopped parsley and dried tarragon.
5. Add white wine to the slow cooker.
6. Cover and cook on high for about an hour.
7. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking for 8-10 hours until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Makes 6 servings.
